prompt_template_suffix: Framing: central circular composition with crisp black ring border; paper-white uniform background outside the ring. Cel-shaded or vector-comic look with clear ink outlines; optional halftone shading; no text, no watermark, no logo.

scenarios.name: round_action_snow_01
scenarios.prompt: detailed digital illustration, semi-vector comic style, clear outlines, cold mountain snow ridge, dynamic diagonal motion bottom-left to top-right, snowmobile with futuristic design and pilot in helmet, massive spiked round monster upper right shooting fireball, orange warm accents against blue ice, high detail, 8k

scenarios.name: round_portrait_object_01
scenarios.prompt: isolated hero object centered, soft studio lighting, circular composition intent, no text, product illustration, saturated colors, clean render

scenarios.name: cyber_cycle_neon
scenarios.prompt: Detailed digital comic book illustration in a central round frame with black edging. A futuristic neon-lit motorcycle leaning into a sharp turn. Neon blue and magenta light trails. Kinetic speed lines. Around the frame: solid white background. Pop-out effect: the front wheel and bright pink light streaks cross the border at 4 and 8 o'clock onto the white space. High contrast, cel-shaded, vibrant gradients, 8k quality.

scenarios.name: starship_nebula_exit
scenarios.prompt: Comic style illustration inside a circular black border. A sleek starship jumping into hyperspace through a glowing orange nebula. Deep space blues and purples. Kinetic energy sparks. External area: clean white background. Breakthrough effect: the ship's engine exhaust and crystalline nebula fragments burst through the top-right border at 1 and 2 o'clock. Sharp ink outlines, halftone patterns, 8k resolution.

scenarios.name: dragon_temple_smoke
scenarios.prompt: Detailed vector-comic illustration in a round frame. An ancient Japanese temple surrounded by swirling mystical spirit clouds. Cool teal and warm gold color palette. Background outside circle: pure white. Exit points: thick stylized clouds of smoke and temple roof tiles overlap the frame at 5, 7, and 11 o'clock. Dynamic composition, clean linework, soft shadow gradients, 8k quality.

scenarios.name: space_marine_snowmobile
scenarios.prompt: High-quality comic book illustration in a central circular frame with black border. A space marine in heavy red and green armor riding a futuristic snowmobile up a steep snowy ridge. Cold blue mountain shadows. A jagged one-eyed red monster in the upper right firing a glowing fireball. External area: blank white background. Pop-out: snow splashes and caterpillar tracks break the border at 7-8 o'clock. Monster spikes and sparks exit the border at 1-2 o'clock. Dynamic action, cel-shaded, 8k quality.

scenarios.name: samurai_duel_petals
scenarios.prompt: Detailed digital comic art in a round black frame. A futuristic cyber-samurai in mid-air strike, katana glowing with white energy. Background of falling pink cherry blossoms. Outer area: minimalist white. Breakthrough: the samurai's cape and a flurry of pink petals overflow the circular frame at 10 and 4 o'clock onto the white background. Bold outlines, halftone dots for shading, high impact composition, 8k.

scenarios.name: underwater_diver_harpoon
scenarios.prompt: Comic book style illustration in a circular frame. A deep-sea diver in a brass steampunk suit fighting a giant mechanical kraken. Dark emerald water and glowing bioluminescent fish. Exterior: uniform white background. Exit effect: the diver's harpoon tip and giant metal tentacles smash through the frame at 3, 6, and 9 o'clock. Bubbles scattering outside the border. Vibrant colors, detailed line art, 8k resolution.

scenarios.name: cyberpunk_hacker_glitch
scenarios.prompt: Digital comic illustration in a round border. A character in a hooded techwear jacket sitting among floating holographic screens. Glitch art aesthetics with electric yellow and violet tones. External space: flat white. Out-of-bounds: holographic code fragments and digital sparks protrude past the border at 12, 2, and 5 o'clock. Perspective view, sharp focus, cel-shaded textures, 8k.

scenarios.name: desert_raider_jump
scenarios.prompt: Dynamic comic illustration in a circular black frame. A desert raider on a hovering sand-skiff jumping over a canyon. Sand dunes in hot orange and deep brown. Exterior background: paper-white. Pop-out: a massive dust cloud and the front of the skiff cross the frame boundary at 8 o'clock. Small pebbles flying out at 4 o'clock. Speed lines, dramatic lighting, high quality digital art, 8k.
